ddls:
CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol representing the parameter */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowable value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowable value for the parameter */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of measurement for the parameter */,
  "tolerance" REAL /* Tolerance of the parameter (as a percentage) */,
  "default_value" REAL /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter type (e.g., Voltage, Current, Time) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the parameter type (e.g., Electrical, Mechanical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., V, μA, ns) */,
  "conversion_factor" REAL /* Conversion factor for the unit (for standardization) */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Dimension of the unit (e.g., length, time, current) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "revision" TEXT /* Revision number of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_parameters" (
  "product_param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for product-parameter association */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product related to the parameter */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter associated with the product */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type ID of the parameter */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value of the parameter for this product */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value of the parameter for this product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_parameters_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES parameter_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_parameters_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_parameters_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parameter limit entry */,
  "product_param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product-parameter association */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowable value for this product revision */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowable value for this product revision */,
  "revision" TEXT /* Revision number of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_limits_product_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_param_id") REFERENCES product_parameters ("product_param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "product_param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product-parameter association */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the parameter */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was recorded */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_product_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_param_id") REFERENCES product_parameters ("product_param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_relationships" (
  "rel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship entry */,
  "param_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first parameter in the relationship */,
  "param_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second parameter in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., dependency, correlation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_relationships_param_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("param_id1") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_relationships_param_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("param_id2") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "manufacturing_processes" (
  "process_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturing process */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product associated with the process */,
  "process_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturing process */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the manufacturing process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_manufacturing_processes_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_process_limits" (
  "plimit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter-process limit entry */,
  "process_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manufacturing process */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter associated with the process */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowable value for this process */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowable value for this process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("plimit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_process_limits_process_id FOREIGN KEY ("process_id") REFERENCES manufacturing_processes ("process_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_process_limits_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)
